request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<litleOnlineRequest merchantId="123456" version="12.0" xmlns="http://www.litle.com/schema">
  <authentication>
    <user>username</user>
    <password>password</password>
  </authentication>
  <registerTokenRequest reportGroup="Default" id="token_001">
    <orderId>ORD-TOKEN-001</orderId>
    <accountNumber>4111111111111111</accountNumber>
  </registerTokenRequest>
</litleOnlineRequest>

response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<litleOnlineResponse version="12.0" response="0" message="Valid Format" xmlns="http://www.litle.com/schema">
  <registerTokenResponse reportGroup="Default" id="token_001">
    <cnpTxnId>782011469385</cnpTxnId>
    <orderId>ORD-TOKEN-001</orderId>
    <response>801</response>
    <message>Account number was successfully registered</message>
    <litleToken>1111000100003276</litleToken>
    <type>VI</type>
    <echeck/>
    <bin>411111</bin>
  </registerTokenResponse>
</litleOnlineResponse>
